description_long:
Glowharbor is scheduling software for wellness studios — yoga, pilates, massage, and spa businesses. Clients book online, pay deposits, and receive reminders, while studios manage staff calendars and class capacity from a single dashboard.

Pricing is flat at $29 per month per location with a 14-day free trial. The site states little else: nothing about the company, its team, integrations, or how it compares to other studio-management tools, so this profile is limited to the booking features the page names.
